title: Retire stale topic branches and align ticketed commit naming
summary: Audit the remaining stale remote topic branches against current main, retire the obsolete ones safely, and align HumbleStudio's local workflow truth with ticket-scoped branch and commit naming used in sibling repositories.
acceptance_criteria: Remaining stale remote topic branches are audited directly against current main and either promoted or explicitly proven obsolete.
Repo-local workflow truth documents that ticketed branches and commit scopes should carry the same primary HS ticket ids.
The local HumbleStudio iteration skill reflects the same branch and commit naming rule plus the direct stale-branch audit rule.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and workflow-focused verification pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Direct HEAD-versus-remote diff showed the stale preview branch would remove newer proposal, recovery, and ticket work from current main rather than add new value.
Direct HEAD-versus-remote diff showed the stale onboarding branch would roll back newer tickets, proposal workflow, and recovery/localization work from current main.
Deleted the stale remote preview branch after proving it was superseded by current main.
Deleted the stale remote onboarding branch after proving it was superseded by current main.
HS-0013 ticket schema validated after recording stale-branch cleanup and naming-contract alignment.
Repo contract validation passed after tightening local ticket-scoped branch and commit naming truth.
Workflow-only local checks passed after the branch cleanup and workflow truth updates.
Patch hygiene passed for the workflow truth and ticket evidence updates.

trigger.source_ref: Direct branch audit showed two stale remote branches still existed and local HumbleStudio workflow truth had not yet adopted ticket-scoped commit naming used in sibling repositories.

agent_notes: This slice treats direct HEAD-versus-remote diffs as authoritative for stale branch cleanup so older branches are not accidentally replayed onto newer main work.
Commit scope for this slice should include HS-0013 to match the ticketed branch naming contract used in sibling repositories.
